name: wp-authvault
description: Build and minify assets for WP AuthVault.

scripts.minify: npm run minify:js && npm run minify:css
scripts.minify:js: terser assets/js/authvault-public.js -o assets/js/authvault-public.min.js -c -m && terser assets/js/authvault-admin.js -o assets/js/authvault-admin.min.js -c -m
scripts.minify:css: cleancss -O2 -o assets/css/authvault-public.min.css assets/css/authvault-public.css && cleancss -O2 -o assets/css/authvault-admin.min.css assets/css/authvault-admin.css && cleancss -O2 -o assets/css/authvault-elementor.min.css assets/css/authvault-elementor.css
